rationale: Educ. Code §12.103 governs applicability of laws to open-enrollment charter schools. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: Except as provided by Subsection (b) or (c), an open-enrollment charter school is subject to federal and state laws and rules governing public schools and to municipal zoning ordinances governing public schools.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no interaction between provisions.
